name: agent-spy
description: WinSpy inspired tool for Agents - The last desktop automation tool your Agents need

scripts.build:linux: npm run patch:crates && cargo build --release --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.build:windows: npm run patch:crates && cargo build --release --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.build:xwindows:build: cross-env PATH=$(dirname $(which clang-cl)):$(dirname $(which lld-link)):$PATH cargo xwin build --release --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.build:macos: npm run patch:crates && cargo build --release --target aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.build:macos:intel: npm run patch:crates && cargo build --release --target x86_64-apple-darwin

author: Sepehr Laal
